content: There are some people in the Boston area starting up a local OSM meetup. They were enthused by meeting each other at State of the Map US these last couple of years.

There has been one meetup already, a few months back. There will be one coming up on July 29th which is a Wednesday, though it will be virtual. I think that is to accommodate people who can't make it IRL. I'll plan to be there. I'll keep you posted when specific details arise.
Hopefully there will also be IRL events. One of the organizers wanted to do a group edit day at some point which would be fun, and very IRL.
